appName.description: Extension name shown in panel header

waitingForSubtitles.description: Shown when no subtitles are available

loadingLanguage.description: Spinner label while fetching subtitles. $lang$ = language code like 'ja'

failedToLoadSubtitles.description: Error status when subtitle fetch fails

learningLanguage.description: Tooltip for the L2 language dropdown

allLanguages.description: Optgroup label for all other languages

translate.description: Label for the translation toggle switch

translating.description: Status during translation. $progress$ = current, $total$ = total lines

actions.description: Tooltip for the cue menu button (…)

copy.description: Menu item to copy subtitle text

speak.description: Menu item to speak subtitle text via TTS

explain.description: Menu item to get AI explanation of a line

explainTitle.description: Header for the AI explanation card

aiThinking.description: Shown while waiting for AI explanation

saved.description: Button state after word is saved

showTranscript.description: Popup button to open the transcript panel

noTranscriptFound.description: Popup message when no subtitles detected

extensionDescription.message: Interactive dual subtitles for language learning on Prime Video, YouTube, Netflix, Disney+, Hulu, and Max.
extensionDescription.description: Extension description in manifest and Chrome Web Store

popupLoginPrompt.message: Log in to save words and sync with Language Player.

popupInstructions.message: Start playing any video on Prime Video, YouTube, or Netflix. The transcript panel opens automatically when subtitles are found.

popupClickWord.message: Click any word to look it up in the dictionary

popupSaveWords.message: Save words to your Language Player account

popupCaptionsHint.message: 💡 Make sure captions are turned on in the language you're studying.
